introSection: Flash: Vertical Velocity is a steel shuttle launched roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On August 13, 2023, the ride was teased by the park via a math problem.

On August 30, 2023, The Flash: Vertical Velocity was offically announced by Six Flags Great Adventure.

On August 13, 2024, Six Flags Great Adventure announced that the ride's opening was delayed to 2025.

On March 27, 2025 a media day was held. The ride opened two days later.

fullText:
Flash: Vertical Velocity is a steel shuttle launched roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

On August 13, 2023, the ride was teased by the park via a math problem.

On August 30, 2023, The Flash: Vertical Velocity was offically announced by Six Flags Great Adventure.

On August 13, 2024, Six Flags Great Adventure announced that the ride's opening was delayed to 2025.

On March 27, 2025 a media day was held. The ride opened two days later.
